name: Portabella Mushrooms and Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the portabella mushrooms well, drain, dry and cut off the stems.
2. Cut the mushrooms into thick strips, then into medium chunks.
3. In a large skillet, heat the oil over medium heat.
4. Sauté the garlic until golden brown.
5. Add the mushrooms and sauté until well browned.
6. Add the parsley, salt, and pepper; stir to combine.
7. Serve over hot pasta.
